message.body: Finally installed my internal SSD, could've used it as an alternative drive, but I decided to make a separate windows install on it which was definitely the right choice since this is way more responsive.
Since windows is installed on the SSD, accesses to windows files (dlls and stuff) is a lot faster, making the OS as a whole more responsive
You can shoot under the sun while it's on the ground in shine & bright, right?

That's what I was thinking about actually, what if, in scenarios where you can choose, you prioritized the sun in phase 3, since you can shoot under it to hit the moon if they're both on the same side? If so, I'm guessing it wouldn't be worth it since you have to deal with shield bullets
Sorry for sending like, wall after wall btw, lol
